 {"id":"bd-r5h5","title":"Real unit tests for review locking mechanism","description":"Test review locking with real flock operations.

Functions to test:
- acquire_review_lock(): Get exclusive lock
- release_review_lock(): Release lock
- get_review_lock_file(), get_review_lock_info_file()
- check_stale_lock(): Detect abandoned locks
- with_state_lock(): Lock wrapper

Test cases:
- Lock acquisition succeeds when unlocked
- Lock fails when already held (in subprocess)
- Stale lock detection after process death
- Lock info file contents
- Graceful cleanup on signals

Uses real flock in isolated environment.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:54:15.848496999-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T11:00:43.10401743-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T11:00:43.10401743-05:00","close_reason":"Created test_unit_review_locking.sh with 15 tests covering: get_review_lock_file, get_review_lock_info_file, acquire_review_lock, release_review_lock, check_stale_lock, concurrent access scenarios, and lock info file content validation. All tests pass, ShellCheck clean.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-r5h5","depends_on_id":"bd-c3vu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:54:15.868232282-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-r5h5","depends_on_id":"bd-r5mu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:54:15.88835264-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-r5mu","title":"Real unit tests for review state management","description":"Test review state management with real file operations.

Functions to test:
- init_review_state(): Initialize state directory
- update_review_state(): Update state files
- get_review_state_dir(), get_review_state_file()
- checkpoint_review_state(): Save checkpoint
- load_review_checkpoint(), clear_review_checkpoint()

Test cases:
- State directory creation
- Checkpoint save/load cycle
- State file format validation
- Concurrent access (with flock)
- Recovery from corrupted state

Uses real XDG state dirs in temp environment.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T21:54:15.74943011-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T23:18:32.24300767-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T23:18:32.24300767-05:00","close_reason":"Created test_unit_review_state.sh with 15 unit tests covering get_review_state_dir, get_review_state_file, get_checkpoint_file, init_review_state, checkpoint_review_state, load_review_checkpoint, and clear_review_checkpoint.  {"id":"bd-rgkj","title":"Installer: fix latest release version detection + deps","description":"Fix installer reliability and portable locks.

- Installer: self-refresh when executed from /dev/fd to bypass stale CDN/proxy caches; normalize RU_VERSION by stripping leading v.
- Locking: ensure corrupt/invalid lock info releases lock dirs (review lock + state lock).
- Tests: migrate review locking/unit/e2e tests away from flock assumptions; use directory locks.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-05T14:37:38.431100067-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-05T15:01:06.297360057-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-05T15:01:06.297360057-05:00","close_reason":"Final polish: updated scripts/test_e2e_error_handling.sh to simulate a held review lock via review.lock.info (matching current dir-lock implementation). Commit: 4af74ee."}
-{"id":"bd-rhea","title":"Implement print_agent_sweep_summary()","description":"# Summary Reporting

## Parent Epic: bd-mkoc (Agent Sweep Command Implementation)

## Purpose
Print human-readable and JSON summaries at end of sweep.

## Human Output (stderr)

```
╭─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│                   Agent Sweep Complete                       │
│                                                             │
│  Processed: 5 repos                                         │
│  Succeeded: 5                                               │
│  Failed: 0                                                  │
│  Skipped: 1                                                 │
│  Total time: 8m 23s                                         │
╰─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

## JSON Output (stdout with --json)

```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-01-06T15:30:00Z",
  "run_id": "20260106-153000-12345",
  "duration_seconds": 503,
  "summary": {
    "total": 5,
    "succeeded": 5,
    "failed": 0,
    "skipped": 1
  },
  "repos": [
    {
      "name": "repo1",
      "path": "/data/projects/repo1",
      "success": true,
      "phases_completed": 2,
      "duration_seconds": 123,
      "head_before": "abc123",
      "head_after": "def456",
      "commits": [{"sha": "def456", "subject": "feat: ..."}],
      "artifacts_dir": "~/.local/state/ru/agent-sweep/runs/.../repo1"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Implementation
- Aggregate results from NDJSON results file
- Format based on --json flag
- Include artifact paths for debugging
- Show failed repos with error details","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T16:57:34.841060622-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-06T20:03:19.336733176-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-rhea","depends_on_id":"bd-a15t","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:38:02.281411639-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-rwja","title":"Write plan validation and execution tests","description":"Implements detailed tests for commit and release plan validation/execution.

## Parent Epic: bd-a2wt (Testing Strategy)

## Test File
scripts/test_plan_validation.sh

## Purpose
Ensure plan validation correctly rejects invalid plans and execution works correctly for valid plans. These are critical security tests.

## Commit Plan Validation Tests

### Valid Plan Tests
- Test minimal valid commit plan structure
- Test plan with multiple commits
- Test plan with various file operations (add, modify, delete)

### Invalid Plan Tests
- Test plans with denied files (.env, id_rsa, node_modules, etc.)
- Test malformed JSON (missing fields, wrong types)
- Test shell injection attempts in message fields
- Test path traversal attempts (../ in paths)

## Commit Plan Execution Tests
- Test successful commit creation
- Test multi-commit execution in order
- Test new file addition
- Test file modification
- Test handling of execution failures

## Release Plan Validation Tests
- Test valid release plan acceptance
- Test duplicate tag rejection
- Test invalid version format rejection (non-semver)
- Test title/body length limits
- Test missing changelog rejection

## Logging Requirements
Every test MUST:
1. Call log_test_start() with test name
2. Use log_verbose() for each check
3. Use log_success() or log_error() for results
4. Report assertion counts

## Related Beads
- Tests: bd-8bxp (validate_commit_plan)
- Tests: bd-prgk (execute_commit_plan)
- Tests: bd-u2t8 (validate/execute release plan)
- Parent epic: bd-a2wt (Testing Strategy)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Valid commit plans pass validation
- [ ] Denied files in plans are rejected
- [ ] Malformed JSON is rejected
- [ ] Shell injection attempts are blocked
- [ ] Path traversal attempts are blocked
- [ ] Commit execution creates correct commits
- [ ] Valid release plans pass validation
- [ ] Duplicate tags are rejected
- [ ] Invalid version formats are rejected
- [ ] All tests have detailed logging","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:26:05.059584829-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-06T17:26:05.059584829-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-rwja","depends_on_id":"bd-8bxp","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:27:37.417803329-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-rwja","depends_on_id":"bd-prgk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:27:37.441641297-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-rwja","depends_on_id":"bd-u2t8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:27:37.464415092-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-rwja","depends_on_id":"bd-2ze9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-06T17:38:02.152736462-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
